banner.testnet: Sentrix Testnet — assets have no real-world value
rwa.heading: TOKENISED ASSETS
rwa.empty_body: Real-world assets will appear here once partner registries publish their on-chain proofs. Each listing carries its own verification anchor.
detail.body_pending: Full body fetched from the gRPC GetBlock / GetTx endpoints lands in the next iteration.
detail.tx_outside_window: This tx isn't in the live observation window (last ~500 transactions). The chain proto doesn't yet expose `GetTransaction` for arbitrary lookup, so older txs require an indexer round-trip — coming with chain v0.3.
contracts.heading: DEPLOYED CONTRACTS
contracts.empty_body: Deploy a contract via /lab — successful submissions are recorded here for quick access. History is per-device (localStorage).
not_found.body: This route doesn't lead anywhere on the explorer.

error.node_body: The Sentrix node is taking longer than expected to respond. Streams will resume automatically.
